channel.title: Psi4 on Jackson Crowley
channel.description: Recent content in Psi4 on Jackson Crowley

item.title: My first QM: From SMILES string to dihedral scan
item.description: This post goes over my first attempt at starting with nothing but a SMILES string, converting that into a molecule file with optimised geometry, and performing some basic QM calculations in Psi4 to do a dihedral scan. There are also a few notes on quantum chemistry, but be warned: having never formally studied the stuff, I may have made some extremely embarassing errors (and am very open to being corrected).
